cluster.title: Backend — Identity, Auth & Secrets
cluster.summary: The identity plane of services/backend: identity store, sessions, OIDC/Google, SAML, passwords, MFA, SCIM, lockout, magic links, SIWE, invitations, RBAC, dev IdP, API keys, BYOK provider keys, tool-use/privacy policies, Team destination, Settings namespaces, plus the claimed TokenVault (Fernet local + AWS KMS envelope). Uniform Protocol-store/dual-adapter/service architecture with strong per-module code; the real debt is in composition wiring (RBAC never enforced, PostgresSiweStore unwired) and hand-mirrored cross-language contracts.

nodes.summary: IdentityStore Protocol + InMemory/Postgres adapters: orgs, users, members, roles, auth providers, append-only identity audit + login attempts.
HMAC bearer mint/verify (_BearerCodec), session rows keyed by sha256(signature), touch/revoke/list, MFA-satisfied stamp, retention sweeper.
OIDC authorize→callback→session, JWKS cache + ID-token verify, env-configured global Google provider, PKCE primitives.
SAML 2.0 mirror of OidcService; SamlVerifier Protocol isolates python3-saml/xmlsec1 behind OneLogin + Fake verifiers.
EIP-4361 build/strict-parse, EIP-191 recovery, chain allowlist, single-use nonces, link-or-provision wallet identities.
Argon2id local auth + bootstrap admin, TOTP/WebAuthn/recovery MFA (TokenVault-encrypted seeds), sliding-window lockout on every login path.
IdP discovery (anti-enumeration), magic links, workspace-pick tokens, in-memory rate limiter, email dispatcher port.
SCIM 2.0 User/Group CRUD + role sync, filter parser, route-boundary serializer, sha256-at-rest tokens.
One-time invite links (accept = user+member+role in one txn); shared provision_personal_org used by Google + SIWE self-signup.
RequireScopes/RequireRoles/public_route FastAPI deps; RBAC_MODE audit-vs-enforce (default audit = pass-through); mfa:pending hard deny.
user_profiles + user_preferences JSONB sidecars; avatar BYTEA store with ETag.
Dev-only /v1/dev/personas + /v1/dev/identity/mint; YAML persona directory with mtime reload; standalone HMAC signer; 365-day session-less bearers.
atlas_pk_* bearer parse/mint, peppered HMAC-SHA256 at rest, constant-time verify, CRUD + rotate + last-used stamping.
BYOK provider keys: TokenVault encrypt-on-write, hint-only /v1/settings/provider-keys surface, internal decrypted_keys lane for the runtime aggregate.
tool_use_policies (read/write/destructive × auto/ask/require/block, workspace default + user override) and privacy_settings toggles.
Team destination: read projection over identity tables, invite/role-change/offboard orchestration, in-memory SSE activity bus at /v1/team/stream.
Namespace'd JSONB settings: user notifications inside user_preferences, tenant rows in tenant_settings; ACL + audit + deep-merge in the service layer.
TokenVault ABC: Fernet LocalTokenVault (+ legacy XOR fallback), kms_v1 envelope, AwsKmsTokenVault, decrypt TTL cache, fail-closed factory, rotation CLI.

edges.label: mints the same SessionService bearer as every login ramp
self-signup via shared provision_personal_org
user lookup, login attempts, audit rows
encrypts OIDC client secrets (incl. global Google) at rest
TOTP secret encryption via TokenVault
BYOK keys encrypt-on-write / decrypt for runtime lane
invite delegates to InvitationsService (no parallel invite path)
user namespaces deep-merge into the user_preferences JSONB blob (migration 0018)
idempotent persona org/user seeding on first mint
CLAIM_* bearer claim names from copilot_service_contracts.auth_claims
scope string catalog (RUNTIME_USE, MFA_PENDING, ...)
BackendServiceAuthenticator trusted-header envelope
pinned Google OIDC endpoints; token exchange + JWKS fetch
eth_account EIP-191 signature recovery + EIP-55 checksums
boto3 KMS encrypt/decrypt (kms_v1 envelope)
Postgres adapters for every identity/session/key store
AuthnRequest/ACS via python3-saml OneLoginSamlVerifier
proxies /v1/auth/*, /v1/dev/*, /v1/settings/provider-keys*, /v1/team*, /v1/settings/*
POST /internal/v1/auth/api-keys/verify for atlas_pk_* bearers
byte-identical HMAC bearer scheme (sign here, verify there) + session touch
GET /internal/v1/policies/runtime at run-create (policies + privacy + decrypted BYOK keys)
byte-identical EIP-4361 message template (siweMessage.ts)
local no-account login drives /v1/auth/siwe/{nonce,verify} with a third template copy
ENTERPRISE_AUTH_SECRET / SESSION_* TTLs; RBAC_MODE; SIWE_*; GOOGLE_OAUTH_*; MCP_TOKEN_VAULT_*
